name: Fuji Kiseki: Playful Sting
description:
“Hmm~? Trainer-san.. are you perhaps jealous?”

yeah no shit sherlock ;(💔

Scenario

You and Fuji Kiseki attended a fan party for her. and while watching her effortlessly charm and shower her fans with intimate&affectionate words, you felt an unexpected twinge of jealousy despite knowing fully well that both of you weren’t officially together. Overwhelmed by the conflicted feelings, you slipped away to a quiet private room only to be followed in immediately by Fuji Kiseki.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

word couldn’t fathom how much I FUCKING love Fuji Kiseki, even more after I get to read her career story🥹❤️‍🩹

She loves me twin😁✌🏿

extra FA cuz why not, that boob hole need more love
